basicInfo.name: Nightmare Pascal
basicInfo.flavor: After the unification of Aisha, Pascal elected Four Lords to watch over the land. There are rumors that he changed after meeting Bai Jiao.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Titan of Calamities
Skill 2.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 1000% of Magic Attack 1 time(s). [Additional 50% Crit Rate]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Crit Rate Boost to 50%.

Passive.name: Gate to the Abyss
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Magic Attack Boost. [Always Active].
 - Grants Crit Damage Boost. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Crit Damage Boost to 40%.

profile.story:
A young mage who joined Silvesta on his quest to purify the Power of Destruction. He is Evan's rival when Evan travels back to the past.
Similar to Evan's fighting style, which consists purely of physical attacks, Pascal only uses magic.
However, unlike Evan, who is perpetually optimistic and quick to help others, Pascal is prone to brooding and focusing on a singular issue.
When he was a young man, a prophecy declared that he would become the next emperor. As a result of this prophecy, he spent his childhood on the run from various forces who wanted to be rid of him. His family were all killed as a result, and Pascal only survived due to the intervention of Silvesta, who happened to be passing by at the time.
Afterwards, he took on a new identity to travel alongside and study under Silvesta as his pupil.
Pascal was used to being the subject of intense jealousy and unwanted attention over his talent for magic and his prophesied ascent to the imperial throne, but he soon found himself the weakest and least talented of Silvesta's crew, which put his mind at ease for the first time.
He began to develop an unhealthy admiration for Silvesta and crew, alongside the notion that the only thing that could bring about peace is overwhelming strength.
However, he was well-aware that these ideals would not go over well with Silvesta and the others, so he hides them and hides them well.
But, when Evan arrives to join the crew and replaces him as the subject of Silvesta's attention, the peace of mind that Pascal had achieved by being around Silvesta starts to deteriorate even more rapidly.
While not as strong as Karin's, he has also inherited a great amount of the ancients' power.
